title: rabdosia javanica
intro: Rabdosia javanica, also known as Javan Plume Moss or Javan Plume, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine and has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rabdosia javanica include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. Rabdosia javanica is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is typically used in combination with other medicinal herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
